# Water Damage Champ
# https://waterdamagechamp.com

## About
Water Damage Champ provides 24/7 emergency water damage restoration services across California and Florida. IICRC-certified technicians deliver emergency water extraction, structural drying, mold remediation, fire damage restoration, sewage cleanup, and complete property reconstruction.

## Services
- Water Damage Restoration
- Water Extraction & Removal
- Flood Damage Repair
- Mold Remediation & Removal
- Storm Damage Restoration
- Fire & Smoke Damage Restoration
- Sewage Cleanup & Sanitization
- Crawlspace Encapsulation
- Ceiling & Wall Water Damage Repair
- Sump Pump Failure Cleanup
- Flooded Basement Restoration
- Burst Pipe Water Damage
- Odor Removal & Deodorization
- Commercial Water Damage Restoration
- Emergency Water Damage Services

## Service Areas
California: Los Angeles, San Diego, San Francisco, Sacramento, and 45+ cities
Florida: Tampa, St. Petersburg

## Contact
Phone: (888) 510-9436
Email: service@waterdamagechamp.com
Website: https://waterdamagechamp.com
Available: 24/7/365

## Certifications
- IICRC Certified Firm
- Licensed & Insured
- EPA Lead-Safe Certified
